name: Goddess's Twisted Quest
description:
VERSION FOR JANITOR AI.

It’s an Isekai dark fantasy RPG, where gods summon souls from other worlds as there chosen "champions" in a dark world full of dangers, you will have only one task - to hold out longer than everyone else!

Your was summon by the beautiful and generous goddess of life herself, who will transfer you into the body of one of the inhabitants, and which body it is will be up to her. But of course you will be able to influence this, right?

* Caution * Death dove as it is, this bot may contain violent action, and horrors of medieval reality: slavery, rape, etc.

I don’t want to give a big description to not spoil experience.

I spent over a year testing and refining this adventure, and it's now at its best.

I've always been interested in building an adventure with AI that would challenge the user, but also keep a lot of secrets to keep the intrigue alive, and this is what came out of it.

Enjoy your adventures, and good luck, you'll need it here.

Easy mod: you can try to negotiate with one of the other gods, the main thing is to figure out how to turn down your goddess more gently, she is unlikely to take it easily.
creator: Rainbow_Cookies
